subject: A large winged drake in brilliant multicolor plumage — blue, orange, red, yellow, and purple — diving or banking in flight through a pale misty sky
description: A large winged creature — a drake — fills the frame in a dynamic banking or diving pose. The body is covered in vivid, striking scales or plumage in a multicolor array: dominant blue and orange with streaks of red, yellow, and purple. The wings are broad and spread wide, with sharp ridged tips. The long serpentine neck angles the head downward in a striking or diving posture. Taloned feet are visible below the body. The background is a soft, misty pale sky with hints of grey-green cliff or foliage visible at lower right. The overall mood is kinetic and vibrant — the creature's coloration is extraordinarily saturated against the muted sky.
foreground: large diving drake with multicolor body, wings spread, taloned feet
background: pale misty sky, distant grey-green cliffs
emotion: aggressive and kinetic; creature is in active diving motion
